base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of peach_poseset — a character (playable) from 1988 super mario bros 2. Princess Peach — signature float-hover mid-air (1-2 sec glide) but slowest lift + jump. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Princess Peach — signature float-hover mid-air (1-2 sec glide) but slowest lift + jump
